old_example: Besides his salary, the manager receives several additional benefits, including a company car and bonuses.
new_example: Besides his salary, the manager receives additional benefits and bonuses.
new_translation: Ngoài lương, quản lý còn nhận được thêm phúc lợi và thưởng.

old_example: I don't really want to go to the party; besides, I have too much work to do.
new_example: I don't want to go to the party; besides, I have work.
new_translation: Tôi không muốn đi dự tiệc; vả lại tôi còn có việc.

old_example: Reporters continued to besiege the company's headquarters after the news of the sudden merger broke yesterday.
new_example: Reporters continued to besiege the headquarters after the merger news broke.
new_translation: Phóng viên tiếp tục bao vây trụ sở sau khi tin sáp nhập nổ ra.

old_example: Our goal is to provide the best possible customer service to all our international clients.
new_example: Our goal is to provide the best service to all our clients.
new_translation: Mục tiêu của chúng tôi là cung cấp dịch vụ tốt nhất cho khách hàng.

old_example: The detective was horrified by the bestial nature of the crimes committed by the suspect.
new_example: The detective was horrified by the bestial nature of the crimes.
new_translation: Thám tử đã kinh hãi trước bản chất dã man của những tội ác.

old_example: The university decided to bestow an honorary degree upon the famous international human rights activist.
new_example: The university decided to bestow an honorary degree upon the famous activist.
new_translation: Trường đại học đã quyết định trao bằng danh dự cho nhà hoạt động.

old_example: I'll bet that the new international marketing campaign will lead to a significant increase in sales.
new_example: I'll bet the new marketing campaign will significantly increase sales.
new_translation: Tôi cá là chiến dịch tiếp thị mới sẽ làm tăng mạnh doanh số.

old_example: The company is working to provide better working conditions for all its international employees.
new_example: The company is working to provide better conditions for its employees.
new_translation: Công ty đang nỗ lực cung cấp các điều kiện tốt hơn cho nhân viên.

old_example: The non-profit organization is dedicated to the betterment of the local community through its various education and health programs.
new_example: The organization is dedicated to the betterment of the local community.
new_translation: Tổ chức được dành cho việc cải thiện cộng đồng địa phương.

old_example: The government has introduced new regulations to control online betting and prevent underage gambling.
new_example: The government introduced new regulations to control online betting.
new_translation: Chính phủ đã đưa ra các quy định để kiểm soát cá cược trực tuyến.

old_example: The meeting will take place between ten o'clock and noon in the international conference room.
new_example: The meeting will take place between ten o'clock and noon.
new_translation: Cuộc họp sẽ diễn ra trong khoảng từ mười giờ đến trưa.

old_example: The flight attendants will serve a variety of complimentary hot and cold beverages during the flight.
new_example: The flight attendants will serve hot and cold beverages during the flight.
new_translation: Tiếp viên sẽ phục vụ đồ uống nóng và lạnh trong chuyến bay.

old_example: The company exports several types of high-quality organic beverages to major international markets every year.
new_example: The company exports organic beverages to major international markets every year.
new_translation: Công ty xuất khẩu đồ uống hữu cơ sang các thị trường quốc tế.

old_example: The customers were bewildered by the sudden and unexpected changes to the company's international website.
new_example: Customers were bewildered by the sudden changes to the company's website.
new_translation: Khách hàng bàng hoàng trước những thay đổi đột ngột trên trang web.

old_example: The complex technical issues managed to create a bewildering situation for the entire international software team.
new_example: Technical issues managed to create a bewildering situation for the software team.
new_translation: Vấn đề kỹ thuật đã tạo ra một tình huống gây bối rối cho nhóm.

old_example: The success of the new international marketing campaign was truly beyond everyone's initial expectations.
new_example: The success of the new campaign was beyond everyone's initial expectations.
new_translation: Thành công của chiến dịch mới vượt ngoài mong đợi ban đầu.

old_example: The researcher is working to ensure that there is no bias in the international survey results.
new_example: The researcher is working to ensure there is no bias in results.
new_translation: Nhà nghiên cứu đang làm việc để đảm bảo không có sự thiên vị.

old_example: Many experts criticized the report for being biased and failing to consider different international perspectives.
new_example: Experts criticized the report for being biased and failing different perspectives.
new_translation: Các chuyên gia chỉ trích báo cáo vì sự thiên vị và thiếu khách quan.

old_example: Please ensure that you include a detailed bibliography at the end of your international research report.
new_example: Please include a detailed bibliography at the end of your report.
new_translation: Vui lòng bao gồm một thư mục tài liệu ở cuối báo cáo.

old_example: The city recently installed several new bike lanes to provide a safer environment for bicyclists commuting to work in the downtown area.
new_example: The city installed new bike lanes for bicyclists in the downtown area.
new_translation: Thành phố lắp đặt làn xe đạp mới cho người đi xe đạp ở trung tâm.

old_example: The company submitted a competitive bid for the new international construction project in Southeast Asia.
new_example: The company submitted a competitive bid for the new construction project.
new_translation: Công ty đã nộp một bản đấu thầu cạnh tranh cho dự án xây dựng.

old_example: The company is currently bidding for several major international construction and infrastructure projects this year.
new_example: The company is currently bidding for several major construction projects this year.
new_translation: Công ty hiện đang đấu thầu vài dự án xây dựng lớn trong năm nay.

old_example: The company's new regional headquarters is located in a big office building in the city center.
new_example: The company's new headquarters is located in a big office building.
new_translation: Trụ sở mới của công ty nằm trong một tòa nhà văn phòng lớn.

old_example: He usually rides his bike to the office every morning to save time and stay fit.
new_example: He usually rides his bike to the office to save time.
new_translation: Anh ấy thường đi xe đạp đến văn phòng để tiết kiệm thời gian.

old_example: The two countries signed a bilateral trade agreement to encourage international investment and economic cooperation.
new_example: The two countries signed a bilateral trade agreement to encourage investment.
new_translation: Hai nước đã ký thỏa thuận thương mại song phương để khuyến khích đầu tư.

old_example: Please ensure that you pay the electricity bill before the end of the month to avoid fees.
new_example: Please pay the electricity bill before the end of the month.
new_translation: Vui lòng thanh toán hóa đơn điện trước cuối tháng.

old_example: Please contact the billing department if you have any questions regarding your recent international transaction.
new_example: Please contact the billing department if you have questions regarding your transaction.
new_translation: Vui lòng liên hệ bộ phận thanh toán nếu bạn có thắc mắc.

old_example: The international corporation's annual revenue reached over five billion dollars for the first time last year.
new_example: The corporation's annual revenue reached over five billion dollars last year.
new_translation: Doanh thu hàng năm của tập đoàn đạt trên năm tỷ đô la năm ngoái.

old_example: He's in a bit of a bind because he promised to be in two places at once.
new_example: He's in a bind because he promised to be in two places.
new_translation: Anh ấy gặp khó khăn vì đã hứa có mặt ở hai nơi.

old_example: The merger agreement is legally binding and cannot be changed without the consent of both parties.
new_example: The merger agreement is legally binding and cannot be changed.
new_translation: Thỏa thuận sáp nhập có tính ràng buộc pháp lý và không thể thay đổi.

old_example: He went on a binging spree and watched the entire series in one weekend.
new_example: He watched the entire series in one weekend.
new_translation: Anh ấy đã xem hết cả bộ phim trong một cuối tuần.

old_example: We brought a pair of high-powered binoculars to get a better view of the rare birds in the forest.
new_example: We brought a pair of binoculars to see the birds in the forest.
new_translation: Chúng tôi mang theo ống nhòm để nhìn chim trong rừng.

old_example: He used a pair of binoculars to get a better view of the birds.
new_example: He used a pair of binoculars to see the birds better.
new_translation: Anh ấy đã sử dụng ống nhòm để quan sát lũ chim rõ hơn.

old_example: The famous biographer spent several years researching the private letters and diaries of the late president for his upcoming book.
new_example: The biographer spent several years researching the diaries for his new book.
new_translation: Người viết tiểu sử đã dành vài năm nghiên cứu nhật ký cho sách mới.
